subTasks.instructions: Prepare an Aiia operations snapshot: 1) pull the live financial dashboard via the Aiia Finance connector, 2) list current public events from the Aiia Website connector, 3) check who is in the org directory, then combine everything into a short operations brief.
subTasks.output:
# Aiia Operations Snapshot

## Financial Dashboard

The Aiia Finance connector returned a 404 error on the `/dashboard` endpoint [1]. The financial dashboard is currently unavailable. To proceed with live financial reporting, confirm that:
- The Aiia Finance connector is properly configured on the Connectors page
- The correct endpoint path is documented in `connector.describe`
- The Aiia backend service is running and accessible at `http://127.0.0.1:7471`

## Current Events

The Aiia Website connector successfully retrieved the events page [2], but the response body contains only HTML markup and styling — no structured event data. The page loaded, but extractable event listings are not present in the raw HTML returned. A structured events API endpoint or parsed event calendar would be needed to report upcoming public events.

## Organization Directory

Five active personnel are registered in the system [3]:

| Name | Email | Department | Role | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|------|--------|
| Arthur Magaya | admin@rubiem.com | Executive | Admin | Active |
| Godswill | godswill@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Patience | patience@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Arthur | arthur@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Anesu | anesu@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |

## Summary

Organizational structure is intact with a lean 5-person team. Financial metrics and event calendar data are not currently accessible via the configured connectors. To complete this snapshot, restore access to the Finance dashboard endpoint and confirm whether a structured events API is available.

finalReport:
# Aiia Operations Brief

**Snapshot Date:** Current | **Data Sources:** Aiia Finance connector, Aiia Website connector, Organization Directory

---

## Executive Summary

The organization directory is fully accessible and confirms an active, lean 5-person team. However, two of the three data streams — the live financial dashboard and the public events calendar — could not be retrieved in a usable format. Financial and event reporting will remain incomplete until connector access is restored.

---

## 1. Financial Dashboard — ⚠️ Unavailable

The Aiia Finance connector returned a **404 error** on the `/dashboard` endpoint. No live financial metrics could be pulled.

**Recommended remediation steps:**
- Verify the Aiia Finance connector is properly configured on the Connectors page
- Confirm the correct endpoint path via `connector.describe`
- Ensure the Aiia backend service is running and reachable at `http://127.0.0.1:7471`

---

## 2. Public Events — ⚠️ No Structured Data

The Aiia Website connector successfully loaded the events page, but the response contained only HTML markup and styling with **no extractable event listings**.

**Recommended remediation steps:**
- Confirm whether a structured events API endpoint exists
- Alternatively, implement parsing of the rendered event calendar rather than raw HTML

---

## 3. Organization Directory — ✅ Retrieved

Five active personnel are registered in the system:

| Name | Email | Department | Role | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|------|--------|
| Arthur Magaya | admin@rubiem.com | Executive | Admin | Active |
| Godswill | godswill@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Patience | patience@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Arthur | arthur@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |
| Anesu | anesu@aiinstituteafrica.com | AI Institute Africa | Member | Active |

**Structure:** One Executive admin overseeing four AI Institute Africa members. All accounts are active — no dormant or pending entries.

---

## Operational Assessment & Next Steps

| Area | Status | Action Required |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| Org Directory | ✅ Healthy | None — monitoring only |
| Finance Dashboard | ❌ Down | Fix connector endpoint / verify backend service |
| Events Feed | ⚠️ Degraded | Identify structured events API or add HTML parsing |

**Bottom line:** Team operations are structurally sound, but visibility into finances and public events is currently blocked at the connector layer. Restoring the Finance dashboard endpoint and confirming a structured events data source are the two priority actions needed to complete a full operations snapshot.
